package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadLogPayloadSerializedBeforeSampling() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_log_payload_serialized_before_sampling"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag payload serialization for logs before sampling or level filters run."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
